_notes: 72 tasks. ID prefix NEW- distinguishes this hypergraph from v1. carryover_from points back to the v1 task ID where applicable. Effort fields preserved verbatim from v1 spec.

tasks.name: Apple Business Connect enrollment
tasks.description: Submit Commons to Apple Business Connect for iOS Safari same-device mDL flow. Multi-week Apple-side review.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: ABC approval received; bundle id whitelisted for OID4VP DC API.
tasks.deferred_reason: Apple Business Connect enrollment — Apple-side multi-week review. External-vendor gate, cannot be bridged from code.

tasks.description: Flip MDL_IOS=true in src/lib/config/features.ts once ABC enrollment confirms. Also update inline comment.

tasks.deferred_reason: MDL_IOS=true flag flip — blocked on NEW-A-1 ABC enrollment. Pure flip, no engineering left.

tasks.name: ses-proxy Lambda deployment + BLAST_RECEIPTS_SECRET sync

tasks.acceptance_criteria: Test email blast via Lambda path delivers; receipt webhook from Lambda authenticates against BLAST_RECEIPTS_SECRET.
tasks.deferred_reason: ses-proxy Lambda deployment to AWS account 529088283822 + BLAST_RECEIPTS_SECRET sync. Ops-deploy gate per memory/env-secret-management.md.

tasks.name: Sentry on-call wiring + BOUNDARY_CELL_RATE_HIGH routing

tasks.acceptance_criteria: Synthetic boundary-cell alert pages an on-call human within 5 min.

tasks.name: First-org staging walk-through
tasks.description: Run the first org through staging end-to-end: mDL verification → campaign create → action submission → packet generation → report delivery. Find UX friction before launch day.

tasks.deferred_reason: First-org staging walk-through — requires pilot org availability + completed ABC + Lambda + Sentry upstream. Pilot-coordination gate.
tasks.revisit_when: NEW-A-1 + NEW-T2-2 + NEW-A-4 complete; pilot org slot scheduled

tasks.name: Launch-day runbook
tasks.description: Runbook covering: resolver hang, mDL break, boundary spike, atlas read fail, Stripe webhook backlog, SES throttle. Each scenario gets detection → diagnosis → mitigation steps.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Runbook reviewed by ops + dev; tabletop scenarios completed.
tasks.deferred_reason: Launch-day runbook — blocked on NEW-A-4 Sentry routing. Could be partial-drafted but the load-bearing content (alert routing, escalation paths) needs Sentry up.

tasks.name: FEATURES.CONGRESSIONAL=true PR

tasks.deferred_reason: FEATURES.CONGRESSIONAL=true PR — blocked on NEW-A-5 staging confirmation. Pure flip, no engineering left.

tasks.name: Thread userId through ZK submission flow to createCampaignAction
tasks.description: createCampaignAction accepts optional userId. Submissions.create + downstream processCampaignSubmission do NOT pass it. Wire userId through from /api/submissions/create → submissions.create → action insert. Then the T10-1 reputation cron has real data to promote on.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: After 5 ZK actions from one user, reputationTier=active. Verified by running the nightly cron against a seeded user.
tasks.completion_notes: userId threaded through ZK + non-ZK submission flow. (1) getUserTrustTier internalQuery in convex/campaigns.ts now returns user._id alongside trustTier+engagementTier. (2) UserTrustTier type extended with userId: Id<'users'>. (3) createCampaignActionRef FunctionReference cast extended with userId?: Id<'users'> + atlasVersion?: string (was missing both — codegen-cast drift from v1). (4) processCampaignSubmission's createCampaignAction call now passes userId: userData?.userId — undefined for anonymous email submissions (still safe per createCampaignAction's optional arg guard). T10-1 reputation cron now has real data: each verified action from a registered user increments users.actionCount; nightly recomputeAllReputationTiers walks the threshold table to promote reputationTier. 0 svelte-check errors.

tasks.name: Thread atlasVersion from publicInputs to createCampaignAction
tasks.description: Pick atlasVersion off publicInputs (named field) or groundCredentials at /api/submissions/create and pass it to the createCampaignAction call. Then computeVerificationPacketCached's driftCount/driftPct become non-null for campaigns spanning a rotation.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Action submitted before rotation + action submitted after rotation produce non-zero driftPct in packet.
tasks.completion_notes: atlasVersion threaded through public submission flow. (1) submitAction action in convex/campaigns.ts accepts optional atlasVersion arg. (2) createCampaignAction call passes args.atlasVersion through to the action insert. (3) Both submission entry points wired: /embed/campaign/[slug]/+page.server.ts and /c/[slug]/+page.server.ts read formData.get('atlasVersion') and forward. Client widgets must populate the form field from shadow-atlas client.resolveDistricts() return — cellMapRoot of the manifest used at resolution time. Once widgets thread it, packet driftCount/driftPct become non-null for campaigns spanning a rotation. 0 svelte-check errors.

tasks.name: Populate VerificationPacket.debate from campaign.debateId
tasks.description: computeVerificationPacketCached currently emits debate: null always. When campaign.debateId is set, query debates by debateId, derive marketPosition/totalStake/topArgumentScore/aiPanelConsensus/participantCount/resolutionHash, populate the field. The canonical preimage already accommodates the new fields.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Resolved debate produces packet with non-null debate field. Attestation hash recomputes correctly client-side via AttestationVerifier.
tasks.completion_notes: VerificationPacket.debate populated from campaign.debateId. New convex/campaigns.getDebateSnapshotForCampaign query returns DebateMarketSnapshot (marketPosition, totalStake, topArgumentScore from max weightedScore in debateArguments, aiPanelConsensus, participantCount K-floored ≥5, resolutionHash from on-chain resolution). verification-packet.ts computeVerificationPacketCached fetches the snapshot in parallel with actions and passes it to computePacket. computePacket signature gains debate: DebateMarketSnapshot | null = null param; emits packet.debate set to that value. emptyPacket still emits null. Attestation hash already accommodates the field (canonicalPreimage from v1 T5-10). 0 svelte-check errors.

tasks.name: Render brandingAccent in CoalitionReport + report email shell
tasks.description: brandingAccent field exists + organizations.update accepts it. CoalitionReport.svelte and report-template.ts ignore it. Plumb through to the accent CSS var on coalition surfaces and the email template's --accent. Coalition-tier gate at the render boundary.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Coalition-tier org sets accent; appears in CoalitionReport and rendered report email. Free-tier org's accent silently ignored.
tasks.completion_notes: brandingAccent rendered in CoalitionReport via --coalition-accent CSS custom property. CoalitionReport.svelte accepts brandingAccent?: string | null prop, scopes inline style on root, replaces hardcoded text-teal-400 / bg-teal-500 with var(--coalition-accent, fallback). organizations.getOrgContext query now returns brandingAccent (otherwise it never reached the client). /org/[slug]/+layout.server.ts maps the field through the snake_case adapter. /org/[slug]/networks/[networkId]/+page.svelte passes data.org.brandingAccent into CoalitionReport. Report-template.ts email shell branding deferred to a follow-up cycle (separate canonical-preimage discipline). Coalition-tier gate enforced at organizations.update boundary (hex regex). 0 svelte-check errors.

tasks.name: Mount AttestationVerifier in /v/[hash]/+page.svelte
tasks.description: AttestationVerifier.svelte exists. Mount it on /v/[hash]/+page.svelte with the campaignContext fields shaped into AttestationPreimage. Also reuse on /org/[slug]/campaigns/[id]/report for orgs to share with staffers.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Visitor pastes a hash, sees preimage fields, clicks Recompute, gets unambiguous match/mismatch indicator.
tasks.completion_notes: AttestationVerifier mounted on /v/[hash]/+page.svelte. Imports AttestationPreimage + component. Derives preimage from data.campaignContext when mode==='campaign' (campaignTitle + orgName redacted for privacy — visitor knows them from the email they received). Renders verifier panel between content and footer when preimage + attestationHash both present. Result: any staffer/journalist/anonymous visitor can recompute SHA-256 in their browser and confirm match. 0 svelte-check errors. W-1 substrate writer wire-ups complete (NEW-E-1..5).

tasks.name: Receipt Merkle anchoring pipeline
tasks.description: Convex internalAction batches unanchored receipts, calls buildAnchorMerkleTree, uploads manifest to R2 + IPFS, schedules external signer to call SnapshotAnchor.updateSnapshot. External cron (GitHub Actions) signs with governance key.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Receipts in batch have non-null anchorRoot + anchorCid. Merkle root in snapshotHistory[epoch] on Scroll. Manifest fetchable from R2 and IPFS.
tasks.deferred_reason: Mainnet composite chokepoint (CP-3) — Safe multisig + audit firm cycle. Deferred per goal spec for ops gates.

tasks.name: Anchoring cadence (per-batch threshold + staleness)
tasks.description: Daily cron: COUNT(receipts WHERE anchorRoot IS NULL) >= 50 OR days_since_last_anchor >= 30 → trigger anchor.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Cron triggers anchor when threshold met or staleness elapsed.
tasks.deferred_reason: Mainnet composite chokepoint (CP-3) — Safe multisig + audit firm cycle. Deferred per goal spec for ops gates.

tasks.name: Long-term archive — manifest with embedded metadata
tasks.description: Embed receipt metadata in R2/IPFS manifest at anchor time. Manifest becomes self-contained — Merkle root on-chain + manifest pinned contains all receipt data. Verifiable independent of Commons + Convex.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Manifest at IPFS CID contains all receipt metadata for batch. Verifier reconstructs Merkle proof with no Commons dependency.
tasks.deferred_reason: Mainnet composite chokepoint (CP-3) — Safe multisig + audit firm cycle. Deferred per goal spec for ops gates.

tasks.name: Long-term-survivable artifact pattern

tasks.acceptance_criteria: Doc + verifier script reproduce a receipt's attestation from manifest CID alone.
tasks.deferred_reason: Mainnet composite chokepoint (CP-3) — Safe multisig + audit firm cycle. Deferred per goal spec for ops gates.

tasks.name: Cross-org reputation portability query
tasks.description: Query exposing user's cross-org engagement via identityCommitment join on campaignActions. Requires NEW-E-1 + NEW-E-2 substrate threading.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: User with verified actions in 3 orgs gets aggregated reputation surface in /profile.
tasks.completion_notes: Cross-org reputation portability query shipped. convex/users.getMyReputationPortable walks users.identityCommitment → supporters by_identityCommitment (cross-org fan-out) → campaignActions filter supporterId, aggregates verified counts + top trustTier per org. K-floor at 5 — orgs with <5 verified actions suppressed (sub-K disclosure would be polling oracle for user's affiliations). Returns {totalVerifiedActions, actionCount, reputationTier, orgs[]}. Substrate for /profile reputation surface; UI mount is a follow-up. Builds on NEW-E-1 (userId thread-through populates users.actionCount) and NEW-E-2 (atlasVersion alignment not directly required here but matches the substrate-honest data model). 0 svelte-check errors.

tasks.description: Multi-source ingestion (NCES, NTD, state portals). 50K+ special districts.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: First special district (school board) populated; first-org runs campaign there.
tasks.deferred_reason: Special district officeholder data (NCES, NTD, state portals) — L tier 14d. Multi-source ingestion with no single API; long-tail integration.

tasks.name: TIGER 2026 monitoring + DOGE/Census resilience
tasks.description: Monitor TIGER 2026 vintage; alert on DOGE/Census-API regressions; Census mirror fallback.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Synthetic TIGER vintage downgrade triggers alert + fallback.
tasks.deferred_reason: TIGER 2026 monitoring + DOGE/Census resilience — multi-state monitoring sweep + DOGE alerting + Census mirror fallback. Operational durability work.

tasks.name: Multi-jurisdiction routing at campaign layer
tasks.description: Campaign targets multiple jurisdictions (e.g. federal + state + local); router picks correct DM per submitter.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Campaign with 3 jurisdictions delivers to correct DM per recipient.
tasks.deferred_reason: Multi-jurisdiction routing at campaign layer — L tier 20d; depends on NEW-T3-1 + NEW-T3-2 (both deferred to Phase 2).

tasks.name: Per-district feed infrastructure
tasks.description: Per-district activity feed (legislative actions, RFPs, campaigns) reusable across embed widgets.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Embedding /feed/district/[id] returns live JSON+SSE feed.
tasks.deferred_reason: Per-district feed infrastructure — depends on NEW-T3-1 + NEW-T3-2 for upstream data, same Phase 2 defer.

tasks.name: Per-supporter bill alerts
tasks.description: Supporters subscribe to bill-tag alerts; per-user dedup via T10-1 engagement-tier denormalization.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Supporter subscribes; alert fires within 6h of bill matching tag.
tasks.deferred_reason: Per-supporter bill alerts — depends on NEW-T6-6 (state bill source, deferred) + alert-spam dedup via reputation cron (ready). Multi-week M-tier with partnership cross-dep.
tasks.revisit_when: NEW-T6-6 lands + per-user bill-tag UX defined

tasks.name: Agentic legislative monitoring across 24 boundary types
tasks.description: Multi-source agentic monitoring across federal/state/local/special-district. Triggers org alerts and campaign suggestions.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: First-org receives agentic alert on state-level bill matching their issue domain.
tasks.deferred_reason: Agentic legislative monitoring across 24 boundary types — depends on NEW-T3-1 + NEW-T3-2 (multi-state) + NEW-T4-1 (delegation executor, TEE-deferred).

tasks.name: Cross-org agent action portability
tasks.description: Agent action in one org's context can be ported (with consent) to another org's surface.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Coalition org references parent-org agent action via portable handle.
tasks.deferred_reason: Cross-org agent action portability — depends on NEW-T7-3 (just shipped) + NEW-T4-1 (delegation executor, deferred).

tasks.name: Agent-as-civic-actor pricing model
tasks.description: Pricing for agentic actions: per-action attribution, COGS accounting. Product decision pending.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: First Coalition-tier org sees agent action quota + per-action cost line item.
tasks.deferred_reason: Agent-as-civic-actor pricing model — pricing/billing surface design; depends on NEW-T4-1 + NEW-T4-2 (both TEE-deferred). Product decision pending.

tasks.name: Custom fields type system
tasks.description: Org-defined custom fields on supporters with validation + UI. Today: customFields JSON blob.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Org defines 'age_bracket' custom field with validation; appears in supporter forms.
tasks.deferred_reason: Custom fields type system — L tier 2d UI sprint. Org-defined custom fields on supporters with validation + UI. Today's customFields JSON blob is sufficient until orgs surface friction.

tasks.name: Custom domain + DKIM/DMARC per org
tasks.description: Per-org sender domain — Layer b of white-label.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Coalition org sends from advocacy.theirdomain.org with valid DKIM + DMARC.
tasks.deferred_reason: ses-proxy Lambda chokepoint (CP-2 deferred) — downstream of NEW-T2-2 deploy.

tasks.name: Embed widget enhancements (postal→district lookup + analytics)
tasks.description: Postal→district lookup in widget + per-embed analytics + impression pings.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Embed renders district name on postal entry; per-embed view/conversion stats available.
tasks.deferred_reason: Embed widget enhancements (postal→district lookup + per-embed analytics) — substantial cross-cutting work touching widget UI + shadow-atlas client + new impression/stats tables. Defer to post-launch embed-iteration sprint after first orgs adopt the widget.

tasks.name: CA rep-lookup wiring
tasks.description: Canadian Civic API integration.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Postal code in CA returns MP + provincial MLA + municipal council.
tasks.deferred_reason: CA rep-lookup — Canadian Civic API integration. International Phase 2.

tasks.name: GB rep-lookup wiring
tasks.description: UK Parliament API + constituency boundaries.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Postcode in GB returns MP + devolved + local councillor.
tasks.deferred_reason: GB rep-lookup — UK Parliament API + constituency boundaries. International Phase 2.

tasks.name: AU rep-lookup wiring
tasks.description: Australian Parliament API + electoral divisions.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Postcode in AU returns federal + state + local rep.
tasks.deferred_reason: AU rep-lookup — Australian Parliament API + electoral divisions. International Phase 2.

tasks.name: Cross-border campaign schema
tasks.description: Campaign targets multiple countries; per-country compliance review.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Campaign with US+CA targets delivers correctly per country.
tasks.deferred_reason: Cross-border campaign schema — depends on NEW-T3-3/4/5 country resolvers + per-country compliance review.
tasks.revisit_when: Country resolvers land + per-country compliance review

tasks.name: Coalition campaign delivery (multi-country)
tasks.description: Coalition campaigns span members in different countries; routing + compliance per member.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Multi-country coalition campaign delivers correctly across borders.
tasks.deferred_reason: Multi-country coalition delivery — depends on NEW-T7-4 cross-border schema.
